title: Minecrafter Mix
description: Adds Weapons and Tools Based On Minecrafters.
body:
Minecrafter Mix Mod adds a handcrafted collection of legendary weapons, colorful donuts, and epic combat mechanics — all designed to feel like a natural extension of Minecraft. The mod’s content is inspired by and themed around popular Minecraft YouTubers, bringing their personalities and styles into the game as unique items and abilities.
Legendary Weapons
	•	Wemmbu’s Gambit — A mace with a dice-rolling wager system. Roll an 8 for jackpot and unleash a devastating crater strike that shatters the ground and nearby enemies.
	•	Wemmbu’s Crucible — An armor-shredding mace that evolves through 3 stages as you land hits, culminating in an armor-bypassing crater slam.
	•	Fragger — A fiery sword that feeds on kills to evolve across 3 stages. Right-click to ignite an expanding wave of flame that knocks back and burns everything in its path.
	•	The Quill — A golden blade honoring Theobald, the greatest bird. Paralyzes enemies on hit and detonates nearby TNT Minecarts on command.
	•	Mane Spear — A swift impaling spear. While gliding with an Elytra, slam into enemies and drag them through the sky. Each hit has a chance to shatter armor or deal bonus magic damage.
The Donut Collection
16 color-coded donuts, each always edible and enchantable. Consuming an enchanted donut triggers a burst of matching-colored particles and applies a unique status effect.
New Effects & Mechanics
	•	Paralyze status effect — freezes enemies in place with electric particle visuals
	•	Probability crafting — some recipes have a percentage chance of success, shown in the tooltip
	•	Amethyst Core Block — an extremely durable decorative block
	•	A Knowledge Book given to new players to guide them through the mod’s content.
